q: Do you like watching team games? Why?
examiner_note: Nói về cảm xúc, bầu không khí và tính chiến thuật. Sử dụng 'electric atmosphere', 'tactical nuances', 'edge of one's seat'.

band7.text: I enjoy the excitement and the sense of camaraderie that team sports bring. It’s also fascinating to watch how different individuals work together towards a common goal under pressure.
band7.note: Cấu trúc câu tốt, từ vựng ổn (fascinating, common goal).

band8.text: I’m quite fond of it, primarily because of the electric atmosphere, especially when watching live. There's something gripping about seeing a group of athletes execute a well-rehearsed strategy. It keeps me on the edge of my seat until the final whistle.
band8.note: Sử dụng thành ngữ (edge of my seat) và từ vựng tự nhiên (fond of, electric atmosphere, gripping, execute).

band9.text: Absolutely. I find the tactical nuances of team games to be utterly compelling. It’s not just a display of physical prowess, but a mental chess match played at high speed. The sheer unpredictability and the potential for dramatic comebacks are what make it such an exhilarating experience.
band9.note: Sử dụng ẩn dụ và từ vựng phong phú (tactical nuances, utterly compelling, physical prowess, mental chess match, sheer unpredictability, exhilarating).

v.example: I love analyzing the tactical nuances of the game.

v.meaning: sự dũng mãnh về thể chất
v.example: The athletes displayed incredible physical prowess.

similar_questions: Have you ever watched a live match at a stadium?
What is the best game you have ever watched?
